site.tagline: Manufacturing of ground anchor systems, drilling tools, steel structures and heavy machinery. Full cycle from drawing to shipment.

prokatka.lead: Custom rolling mills built to our own specs, fully automated, with continuous in-process control.

With pre-calibration of the tube blank.

mehanicheskaya-obrabotka.lead: Turning and milling, including on CNC machining centers. Mazak Integrex — 5-axis machining.

items.dsc: On CNC centers and universal machines.
ø up to 1050 mm, height up to 1000 mm.
ø up to 600 mm, module up to 12 mm.

ø up to 1000 mm, length up to 4 m.
ø up to 2500 mm, height up to 1700 mm.

rezka-metalla.title: Metal cutting
rezka-metalla.lead: Plasma and gas cutting of sheet, pipe cutting, shearing of sheet blanks. High throughput and edge accuracy.

items.dsc: Steel up to 35 mm, aluminium up to 25 mm.
Up to 200 mm — straight / angled / radius / template.
Up to 20 mm × 3 m or 12 mm × 2.5 m.
Workpieces up to 800 × 800 mm, length up to 4 m, angle −45°…+45°.

gibka-valcovka.title: Sheet metal bending and rolling
gibka-valcovka.lead: Sheet bending, pipe bending and rolling. Bending to calculated radii and angles.

items.dsc: Rebar, round, square, angle, I-beam, channel.

svarochnye-raboty.title: Welding works (NAKS)
svarochnye-raboty.lead: Welding and assembly works. Welders and procedures are NAKS-certified, with regular recertification.

items.dsc: Welders and equipment are recertified regularly.
Up to 5 t, length up to 15 m, ø up to 3 m.
Structural, alloyed, heat- and corrosion-resistant steels, aluminium.

metalloobrabotka.title: Custom metalworking
metalloobrabotka.lead: Full-cycle metalworking — from blank to finished product. Series and one-off batches.

items.dsc: Scale removal and surface prep for coating.
From blank to coating and assembly.
Up to 5 t, length up to 15 m, ø up to 3 m.
Parts ø up to 700 mm, length up to 1200 mm.

sections.head: Capabilities
sections.title: Series and one-off batches.
sections.body: The plant processes metal from blank to finished product within a single site. This keeps deadlines and quality under control at every operation. We take on both serial orders and one-off products to drawing.

items.dsc: Turning and milling with high repeatability.

termodiffuzionnoe-cinkovanie.title: Thermal-diffusion galvanizing
termodiffuzionnoe-cinkovanie.lead: Dry galvanizing method. A protective coating that penetrates the metal structure. Design service life of the protection — up to 100 years.

sections.head: Advantages
sections.title: Why it pays off for the project.

items.dsc: Design service life of the protection — up to 100 years.
Up to 1000 kg, length up to 3000 mm.
Guaranteed zinc layer on threaded joints.
No aggressive runoff or hydrogen embrittlement.

sections.head: On site
sections.title: Equipment in the shop and on site.

termoobrabotka-tvch.title: HF induction heat treatment
termoobrabotka-tvch.lead: Heat treatment by high-frequency currents: hardening, tempering. Controlled surface and core properties.

items.dsc: Relief of internal stress after welding or hardening.
ø 30–150 mm × up to 3000 mm long, or ø 250 mm × up to 250 mm.
Parts up to 100 kg, dimensions 500 × 500 × 2000 mm.

sections.head: On site
sections.title: Equipment in the shop and on site.

thumbs.cat: ø 30–150 mm, length up to 3000 mm

mehanicheskie-ispytaniya.title: Mechanical testing
mehanicheskie-ispytaniya.lead: Mechanical-property control of finished products and specimens. Documentation accompanying the batch.

sections.head: Laboratory
sections.title: Where testing happens.
sections.body: Testing is performed at our own mechanical-testing area. Tensile machines, hardness testers, impact pendulums — the full cycle from specimen preparation to report. Specimens are taken from the batch and machined to drawing.

items.dsc: Tensile and yield strength, elongation at break.
Brinell and Rockwell on finished products and specimens.
Pendulum impact testing, including at sub-zero temperatures.

ankernye-sistemy.title: Ground anchor systems
ankernye-sistemy.lead: Multifunctional in-house anchor systems for soil reinforcement, slope and retaining-wall stabilization, and shoring of excavations and foundations.

items.dsc: Bore diameters 30 to 135 mm, full length range.
Corrosion protection, design life up to 100 years.

sections.head: Supply geography
sections.title: Where our anchors work.
sections.body: Manufactured since 2012. The anchor systems have passed Russian state expert review and are used on federal-scale construction sites. Export: Germany, Spain, Belarus, Georgia, Kazakhstan.

project.title: Vostochny Cosmodrome
project.body: Launch complex for Soyuz-2. Retaining walls of the gas duct excavation. 1,280 anchor rods.

photoBand.capText: Anchor scheme used on real projects

vintovye-shtangi.title: Tubular threaded bars
vintovye-shtangi.lead: The load-bearing element of the ground anchor system. High-strength steel, thermal diffusion galvanizing for corrosion protection.

items.dsc: Thermal diffusion galvanizing, design service life up to 100 years.
Sized to the project's design load.
Anchor fastenings, ground anchors, slope soil nailing.
Cut to length, joined with couplers per project.
Through the bore, working pressure 5–10 bar.

sections.head: Purpose
sections.title: The anchor's load-bearing element.
sections.body: The screw rod is the main load-bearing element of a ground-anchor system. It is made of high-strength steel with thread rolled along its full length, allowing it to be extended and cut on site. Thermal-diffusion zinc coating protects the thread from corrosion without losing geometry.

items.dsc: Coupling at any length without welding.
The rod is cut to size on the site.
Zinc coating preserves the fit of joints.

gruntovye-ankery.title: Ground anchors
gruntovye-ankery.lead: Full-cycle manufacturing of ground anchors: tendons, couplers, anchor heads, protective elements — engineered per project.

items.dsc: Steel tendons in the required diameter.
Section splicing without loss of strength.
For distributing load to the soil or structure.

sections.head: Purpose
sections.title: Where ground anchors are used.
sections.body: Ground anchors retain excavation walls, retaining structures and slopes, and protect structures against uplift. The plant manufactures load-bearing rods, coupled joints and protective elements to design load. Zinc coating ensures service life in wet and aggressive soils.

items.dsc: With reinforced corrosion protection for the full service life.
Length, thread and load to the designer's brief.

burovoe-oborudovanie.title: Drilling equipment and tools
burovoe-oborudovanie.lead: Manufacturing and repair of drilling tools and equipment for geotechnical, foundation and civil engineering work.

items.dsc: Lead and transport sections, hex couplers.
High-quality repair of tools from any manufacturer.
Fluid storage and supply, heated for winter use.
GEOIZOL, KARST, Statika Engineering, NSK Mechanization, New Ground, Fundex BMGS.

sections.head: No-spoil technologies
sections.title: Piles by Fundex, DDS, Atlas.
sections.body: For Fundex — welded sacrificial tips and connectors E4, E6, E8, conical couplers. For DDS — displacement tools ø 540 and ø 600 mm. For Atlas — displacement tools, drilling pipes, heads, sacrificial shoes. European deep vibro-compaction technology adapted to Russian conditions in cooperation with GEOIZOL Group (since 2014).

sections.head: On site
sections.title: Equipment in the shop and on site.

shneki-cfa.title: CFA augers
shneki-cfa.lead: Continuous Flight Auger (CFA) sections for drilling boreholes for foundations, sheet piles and geotechnical structures.

items.dsc: Feed sections for extending the string.
Section joints with no loss of torque.
Repair and replacement of worn sections.
From ø 420 to ø 800 mm — continuous and leader augers.
Round rock or flat — to customer's choice.
On the most loaded sections — multiplies service life.
Soil removal and grouting in CFA technology.

sections.head: On site
sections.title: Equipment in the shop and on site.

obsadnye-truby.title: Casing and tremie pipes
obsadnye-truby.lead: Complete kit for borehole drilling and filling: casing, tremie string, accessories, transport cassette.

items.dsc: Standard diameters matched to the customer's rig.

items.ttl: Tremie pipes ø273 mm, ø219 mm

items.dsc: Mounted on top of the string.
Storage and shipment of the set.
For casing pipes ø 620–1500 mm, including eccentric.
Connections for DDS, Jet-1 and DTH (Down the Hole).

sections.head: On site
sections.title: Equipment in the shop and on site.

mashinostroenie-pod-zakaz.title: Custom machinery
mashinostroenie-pod-zakaz.lead: Manufacturing of assemblies, parts and special-purpose vehicles to the customer's drawings. Full cycle — from design office to shipment of the finished product.

items.dsc: MBGU-200, sludge vacuum, silo, tow truck and others.
Swing Stetter 2.5–10 m³ on various chassis including Volvo.

items.ttl: Spare parts for quarry excavators and cranes

sections.head: On site
sections.title: Equipment in the shop and on site.

thumbs.cat: On KAMAZ chassis, for GEOIZOL Group

mbgu-200.title: MBGU-200
mbgu-200.lead: Compact hydraulic mobile drilling rig (MBGU-200). For work in confined conditions, on slopes and in underground workings.

items.dsc: Compact — designed for tight working conditions.
40 and 52 mm without changing clamp jaws.
Up to 110 J, up to 3,300 blows/min.
Up to 200 bar, flow up to 120 l/min.

sections.head: Purpose
sections.title: Nail piles on steep slopes.
sections.body: MBGU-100 and MBGU-200 are designed for nail (anchor) pile installation in engineering protection of mountain slopes. Drilling on any slope, including vertical, with or without hydraulic hammer, in soils up to category 8 by drillability. Transport by any means including helicopter. In production since 2013 (MBGU-100) and 2015 (MBGU-200).

sections.head: On site
sections.title: Equipment in the shop and on site.

metallokonstrukcii.title: Welded steel structures
metallokonstrukcii.lead: Structural steelwork and fasteners: from columns and trusses to embedded parts and pipeline supports. Welding shop certified by NAKS.

items.dsc: Load-bearing structures for buildings and facilities.

items.ttl: Stairs, tubular sheet piles, embedded parts

items.dsc: For heating networks and process pipelines.
Up to 500 t of steel structures per month.
From plate, crane-runway and roof-truss girders.
Cell towers, floodlight masts, lightning arresters.

sections.head: On site
sections.title: Equipment in the shop and on site.

about.title: A modern Russian machine-building enterprise.
about.lead: Pushkin Machine-Building Plant LLC combines large production capacity, qualified personnel and growth potential. One of Russia's leading producers of ground anchor systems, drilling equipment and tools, structural steelwork and machine-building assemblies.

sections.head: Strengths
sections.title: Six reasons to work with PMZ.

items.dsc: Total site area over 6.5 ha — two production buildings and an open shipping yard.
Full cycle from drawing to shipment: design, blanking, machining, assembly, inspection.
5-axis Mazak machining centre, CNC machines, plasma cutting, heat-treatment area, NAKS-certified welding shop.
Engineers, designers, process specialists, NAKS welders, CNC operators — 280 people in total.
Machine-building and construction equipment: serial products and bespoke items to customer specification.
Pushkin · close to the M-10 highway and KAD ring road, 30 min to the Sea Port, 15 min to Pulkovo airport.

sections.head: Video tour
sections.title: The plant from the inside: shops, equipment, team.
sections.caption: Production site · Pushkin

sections.head: Location
sections.title: Where the plant is.
sections.body: 196608, St. Petersburg, Pushkin, 17 Novoderevenskaya Street. Convenient location with quick access to major transport routes. Direct exit to the M-10 highway and the KAD ring road. 30 minutes to the Sea Port, 15 minutes to Pulkovo airport, 24 km to central St. Petersburg. The plant sits in Pushkin's historic industrial zone, close to transport routes, the seaport and the airport.

cards.ttl: Company history. One hundred and six years on metal.
Where the plant's products are in service.
Describe the task — we'll prepare a quote.

rukovodstvo.title: Leadership
rukovodstvo.lead: PMZ's management team: the general director and three line directors. Production, development, operations.

sections.head: Management principles
sections.title: How leadership is organised.
sections.body: The plant is run by a general director and three specialised directors — production, quality and development. Decisions are made closest to the process, without unnecessary approvals. This shortens the path from request to shipment.

photoBand.capText: Production site · the team that runs it

socialnaya-otvetstvennost.title: Social responsibility
socialnaya-otvetstvennost.lead: Working conditions, staff training, support for local initiatives — the foundations of the plant's reputation.

items.dsc: Annual workplace assessment (SOUT) 2020–2024. Certified workplaces, regulation workwear and personal protective equipment.
In-house training room (opened 2024) — occupational safety, industrial safety, upskilling.
Joint events with the administration of the Pushkinsky District of St. Petersburg.
A professional holiday with awards for top employees from the district administration and the plant.

sections.head: Approach
sections.title: What our reputation rests on.
sections.body: Social responsibility at the plant means, above all, safe working conditions and staff development. We invest in training, occupational safety and support for local initiatives in Pushkin. A stable enterprise matters to the town as much as to the plant itself.

items.dsc: Support for local initiatives and improvement projects.

otk.title: QC Department and quality control
otk.lead: Multi-stage inspection at every step: incoming — in-process — final. Documentation per GOST and ISO 9001.

items.dsc: Check of rolled stock, fasteners and consumables against supplier certificates.
Geometry, dimensions, hardness and weld quality checked during production.
Final check against the drawing, with batch documentation.
Welders and equipment certified by NAKS (NAKS welding certification), with regular re-certification.
Tensile strength, yield strength, hardness, impact toughness — for critical items.

sections.head: Principle
sections.title: Control at every stage.
sections.body: The plant's QC is built on through-control: incoming — in-process — acceptance. Defects are caught where they arise, not at final acceptance. Each batch is accompanied by a full set of documents.

items.dsc: Confirmation of steel origin and grade.

nagrady-sertifikaty.title: Awards and certificates
nagrady-sertifikaty.lead: ISO 9001 quality management system, annual workplace assessment (SOUT), resident status at the St. Petersburg Import-Substitution Centre. Diplomas from federal and regional competitions.

items.dsc: Implemented and certified. Active quality policy and scheduled audit.

items.ttl: Resident · St. Petersburg Import-Substitution and Localisation Centre
items.dsc: Verified Russian production, NAKS-certified for welding.

thumbs.ttl: Quality of Goods, Works and Services · St. Petersburg Government
Resident of the St. Petersburg Import-Substitution and Localisation Centre

neftegaz.title: Oil & gas construction
neftegaz.lead: Anchor systems, casing pipes, steel structures for offshore and onshore oil & gas facilities.

sections.head: Operating conditions
sections.title: For the sector's loads and environment.
sections.body: Oil and gas facilities operate amid aggressive media, vibration and temperature swings. The plant manufactures anchor systems, casing pipes and steel structures with these requirements in mind. Corrosion protection and documentation to industry norms.

items.dsc: Structures for platforms and mooring facilities.
Pile foundations and supports under equipment.
Casing pipes and retention on difficult soils.

project.title: South Stream gas pipeline
project.body: Anchor support of trench walls, tendon installation in heavy soils, NAKS-certified welding of metal structures.

gidrotehnika.title: Hydraulic engineering
gidrotehnika.lead: Ports, hydropower plants, embankments, quay walls. Screw piles, sheet piling, steel structures.

sections.head: Environment
sections.title: Working in water and soil.
sections.body: Hydraulic structures are in constant contact with water, so protecting the metal from corrosion is a key requirement. The plant supplies screw piles, sheet piling and steel structures with coating for the full service life. Products are designed for static and dynamic loads from water and soil.

items.dsc: Embedded parts and steel structures of hydro units.

project.title: Rogun HPP
project.body: A complex of construction, installation, repair and restoration works.

specstroy.title: Special construction
specstroy.lead: Stationary facilities in the Arctic, at test ranges, special-purpose sites. Structures for extreme operating conditions.

sections.head: Specifics
sections.title: What kinds of tasks we work on.

sections.head: Conditions
sections.title: Extreme loads and climate.
sections.body: Special facilities are built where ordinary solutions fail: the Arctic, test ranges, remote sites. The plant manufactures structures for low temperatures, high loads and rapid installation. Each product is designed for a specific brief.

items.dsc: Steel and coating for low temperatures.
Structures sized for delivery to remote areas.
Modular solutions with minimal on-site work.

project.title: Severnaya Zemlya · Golomyanny Island
project.body: Delivery of equipment to the Arctic — design taking polar conditions into account, fittings ready for −60 °C.

dorozhnoe.title: Road construction
dorozhnoe.lead: Overpasses, bridge crossings, interchanges. Reinforcement cages, crossbeams, supports — both serial and project-specific.

sections.head: Purpose
sections.title: Load-bearing elements of roads.
sections.body: Road facilities — overpasses, bridge crossings, interchanges — require precise geometry and stable metal quality. The plant manufactures reinforcement cages, crossbeams and supports both serially and for a specific facility. Dimensional and weld inspection on every batch.

items.dsc: For supports, pile caps and span structures.
Load-bearing elements of overpasses and viaducts.
For installation and joining of structures.

project.title: Western High-Speed Diameter (WHSD)
project.body: Anchor systems for retaining walls of access ramps, casing for bored piles in coastal soils.

zhilishnoe.title: Residential construction
zhilishnoe.lead: Integrated urban development projects: housing, schools, kindergartens, parking. Anchors, steel structures, reinforcement cages.

items.dsc: For excavation retention in dense urban development.

sections.head: Purpose
sections.title: For integrated development.
sections.body: Residential blocks, schools, kindergartens and parking are built on tight schedules and in large series. The plant supplies anchors and steel structures with predictable quality and steady shipment. This lets the general contractor keep to schedule without downtime.

items.dsc: For facades, excavation walls and foundations.
Serial supply to the construction schedule.

project.title: Residential complex at 19 Kostyushko St.
project.body: Anchor support of an excavation pit in dense urban conditions, deflection control on neighbouring buildings.

zdravoohranenie.title: Healthcare
zdravoohranenie.lead: Special equipment for medical institutions. Rehabilitation systems, custom structures for medical equipment.

sections.head: Approach
sections.title: Manufacturing to specification.
sections.body: Medical facilities order equipment for specific methods and rooms. The plant manufactures rehabilitation complexes and special structures to an individual brief. Assembly precision and surface quality meet medical requirements.

items.dsc: Load-bearing and supporting elements for equipment.
Products to the customer's drawing and brief.

rkosmos.title: Aerospace industry
rkosmos.lead: Geotechnical systems and steel structures for launch complexes. Service life — decades in extreme conditions.

items.dsc: For securing excavation walls and foundations of launch facilities.
Protection against aggressive environments and temperature swings.

items.ttl: Design service life — up to 100 years

sections.head: Requirements
sections.title: A service life of decades.
sections.body: Launch complexes are designed for decades of operation under extreme loads. The plant manufactures geotechnical systems and steel structures with a margin of service life and quality control at every stage. Documentation to the norms of facilities of special responsibility.

items.dsc: Pile and anchor systems for launch structures.
Load-bearing elements with extended service life.
Full quality control and complete documentation.

project.title: Vostochny Cosmodrome
project.body: Launch complex for Soyuz-2. Retaining walls of the gas duct excavation, 1,280 anchor rods.

sport-turizm.title: Sport & tourism cluster
sport-turizm.lead: Support structures for cable cars, slope retention, engineering protection of sports facilities and resorts.

sections.head: Purpose
sections.title: Supporting and retaining structures.
sections.body: Cableways, slopes and sports facilities require reliable retention and precise support geometry. The plant manufactures supporting structures, anchors and engineering-protection elements for the terrain and loads. Anti-corrosion coating for outdoor service.

items.dsc: Supports and fixing units for dynamic loads.

project.title: Krasnaya Polyana — ski cluster
project.body: Anchor systems for slope retaining structures, anti-karst measures and avalanche-protection installations.

kontakty.title: Contacts
kontakty.lead: Production site in Pushkin. Reception, sales department, legal details for contracts.

cta.head: How to buy
cta.title: Send your parameters — we'll prepare a quote.

karyera.title: Careers at PMZ
karyera.lead: The plant in Pushkin is looking for engineers, process technologists, CNC operators, welders and general workers. Full-time, official wages, on-the-job training.

items.dsc: SolidWorks / Inventor, mechanical engineering or steel structures background.
Mazak, milling, turning centers. We're happy to train.
SMAW, GMAW. NAKS certification preferred — we can help you get it.

sections.head: Conditions
sections.title: What we offer.
sections.body: The plant in Pushkin means official employment, steady workload and on-the-job training. Production runs a full cycle, so there is growth from operator to area foreman. A team of engineers and workers invested in the result.

items.dsc: Apply via the site or call the HR department.
Meet the area and the tasks on site.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.lead: How Pushkin Machine-Building Plant LLC processes personal data of site visitors and applicants. Compliant with Russian Federal Law No. 152-FZ «On personal data».

items.dsc: Pushkin Machine-Building Plant LLC (hereinafter — the Operator).
Name, phone, e-mail, company (if given), task description and attached files (drawings, specs).
IP address, country/city derived from IP, browser and device type, navigation across pages — only anonymized via analytics.
Session identifier and UI preferences (language, cookie consent). No analytics cookies before consent.
Reaching back, preparing a spec, price, lead time and contract.
Anonymized analytics of traffic and user behavior.
Bookkeeping and tax accounting, responding to regulator inquiries when required by law.

sections.head: Storage and protection
sections.title: How and how long we store data.

items.dsc: We keep data no longer than needed for the stated purposes — typically 3 years from the last contact about a request, or until consent is revoked.
Technical and organizational measures per art. 19 of Federal Law 152-FZ: access controls, HTTPS encryption in transit, backups, password protection.
We don't transfer data except as explicitly required by law (regulators, courts) or with your explicit consent (logistics, bank transfers).
Get information about the scope and purposes of processing your data.
Request correction of inaccurate or outdated data.
Withdraw consent — your data will be erased, except for what we're legally required to retain.
File a complaint with Roskomnadzor (the Russian data-protection authority).
The current version is published on this page. The last-update date is at the top of each version.
Material changes will be announced on the home page and via e-mail (if you're subscribed).

hero.lead: Geotechnical systems, drilling tools, steel structures and heavy machinery. Full cycle from drawing to shipment on a modern machine park with our own design bureau and quality control per GOST and ISO standards.

turning.title: Turning and milling
turning.desc: Parts up to ø 1050 mm and 1000 mm tall. Series and one-off runs.

cutting.title: Plasma and gas cutting
cutting.desc: Sheet-steel cutting up to 60 mm. Program preparation from DXF.

galvanizing.title: Thermal-diffusion galvanizing
galvanizing.desc: Anti-corrosion coating for fasteners and hardware to spec. Coating 6–100 µm.

welding.title: Welding and assembly
welding.desc: NAKS-certified shop: MIG/MAG, TIG, stick. Ultrasonic and radiographic testing.

bending.title: Roll-forming and pipe bending
bending.desc: Sheet and pipe bending, shell rolling for tanks up to 120 m³.

repair.title: Drilling equipment repair
repair.desc: Refurbishment of drilling tools and equipment of any manufacturer.

projects.head: Projects and clients
projects.title: Where the plant's products work
projects.intro: From the Vostochny Cosmodrome and the Sochi Olympic venues to seaports and the Arctic. PMZ's ground anchor systems, steel structures and drilling tools are at work on flagship sites across Russia and the CIS.

vostochny.title: Vostochny Cosmodrome
vostochny.desc: Pit-wall retention for the gas duct of the Soyuz-2 launch complex. Multifunctional ground anchor system, thermal-diffusion galvanizing, design life — 100 years.

southStream.title: South Stream gas pipeline
southStream.desc: Engineered slope protection along the access road to the offshore section · Anapa.

rogun.title: Rogun Hydropower Plant
rogun.desc: Construction, installation and refurbishment works · Republic of Tajikistan.

krasnayaPolyana.title: Olympic venues · Krasnaya Polyana
krasnayaPolyana.desc: Engineered slope and structure protection for Sochi 2014.

whsd.title: WHSD, phases IV–V
whsd.desc: Western High-Speed Diameter · Steel structures and ground anchor systems for bridge crossings.

arctic.title: Golomyanny Is. · Severnaya Zemlya
arctic.desc: Permanent Arctic facilities — structures engineered for permafrost.

kostyushko.title: Residential complex at 19 Kostyushko St.
kostyushko.desc: St. Petersburg · Apartment building with a built-in kindergarten, hotel and three-level parking.

all.title:
Roads · Hydro · Sport & tourism
Oil & gas · Special construction · Residential
Space · Healthcare

pushkin.lead: PMZ's production site sits in Pushkin — a historic industrial district of St. Petersburg. Direct access to the M-10 federal route and the KAD ring road, 30 minutes from the seaport and 15 minutes from Pulkovo airport.

history.title: One hundred and six years on steel

highlights.h1Alt: The plant. View from Kommunarov Street
highlights.h1Text: The Petrograd Roads Department opened workshops to repair road machinery — the plant later moved to Pushkin.
highlights.h2Text: In besieged Leningrad the plant assembled launcher components for the Katyusha rocket and bridge trusses — without stopping for a single day.
highlights.h3Text: A modern machine park with 5-axis machining centres, NAKS welding certification, deliveries to 68 regions.

cells.d1: Including 14,200 m² of production floor, covered storage for rolled steel and an open dispatch yard.
cells.d2: Mazak machining centres, plasma cutting, hydraulic presses, heat-treatment shop.
cells.d3: From one-off batches to series contracts.
cells.l4: Employees, including our in-house design bureau
cells.d4: Designers, process engineers, NAKS-certified welders, CNC operators.

historyPage.title: One hundred and six years on steel
historyPage.lead: From repair workshops of the Petrograd Road Department in the village of Pulkovo — to a modern plant with 5-axis Mazak machining centers. Six eras, one place, continuous production.

chapters.title: Road workshops in Detskoye Selo
chapters.body: The Petrograd Road Department set up mechanical workshops in the village of Pulkovo to repair road machinery. Two years later the enterprise moved to Detskoye Selo — the future Pushkin — and was housed in former court stables and the riding hall.
chapters.caption: View from Kommunarov street · archive

chapters.title: First Soviet-made equipment
chapters.body: The plant starts manufacturing its own equipment: the country's first bitumen sprayer AG-1 on a YaG-5 chassis, designed by in-house engineer Obukhov. By 1934 it produces mobile workshops, sprayers, bitumen heaters. Overhaul of foreign vehicles AMO-3, Buick, Lincoln, Renault and tractors ChTZ-60, Fordson-Putilovets.

facts.t: Bitumen sprayer AG-1 by engineer Obukhov

chapters.caption: Open materials yard · 1959–1984

chapters.title: War. Evacuation. The front.
chapters.body: When the Great Patriotic War began, the plant was placed under the Leningrad Front and evacuated to Leningrad, to Flyugov Lane. Through all four years of the siege the works did not stop for a single day: tankettes and tractors were repaired, components for Katyusha rocket launchers assembled, bridge trusses and trailers built. Mobile workshops served the front.

facts.t: Bridge trusses for the destroyed bridge on the Luga river

chapters.caption: 3 July 1943 · bridge trusses for the bridge destroyed on the Luga river

chapters.title: Series output. Wagons and street-washing trucks
chapters.body: The plant scales up: KPM-1 street-washing trucks in ten variants, rail forms, vibratory conveyors, mobile fuel stations. In the 1960s housing wagons reach 80% of output. In 1969 the plant school of communist labor opens — a 300-seat hall, library and modern canteen.

facts.t: Plant No. 26 (USSR Ministry of Transport Construction)

chapters.caption: Hydraulic stand for testing springs and assemblies

chapters.title: Concrete mixers. Reaching the world market
chapters.body: By decision of the Ministry of Transport Construction, the plant masters production of concrete mixer trucks under Stetter (Germany) drawings. By 1986 the product is competitive on the world market. Universal metal-cutting machines and Hobart / Lincoln welding semi-automatics are installed — reliable equipment that raises welding quality.
chapters.caption: Anniversary celebration · 50 years of the plant

chapters.title: Full modernization. Mazak. ISO 9001.
chapters.body: Plant-wide modernization with installation of modern equipment. Series production of geotechnical systems and drilling tools begins, a new anchor systems shop opens with an automated line producing 350,000 m per year. The plant is certified to ISO 9001 and commissions a 5-axis Mazak machining center.
chapters.caption: Production site · 2026

historyPage.coda: The story continues — in every part we ship today.
